case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. PATRICIA FLORES et al

docket_entries.description: ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: OSTERMAN, PETER R ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, PATRICIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-02-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAR-13-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED NOV-04-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, PATRICIA
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT FLORES, PATRICIA
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-13-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
